controlling_requirement: Use NOAA Atlas 14 PDS rainfall for 25-year, 15-minute duration.
HGL at inlets and manholes must remain at least 0.30 ft below rim or gutter flowline during the design event.
notes: Applies to CB-1, MH-2, MH-3, CB-3, and OUT-1 profile points.

controlling_requirement: No overtopping of Old Mill Road centerline is permitted in the design event.
notes: Current criteria control over older headwater ratio notes.

controlling_requirement: Use inspected existing-pipe condition roughness where inspection notes conflict with generic material defaults.
notes: Applies to aged RCP and CMP segments.

controlling_requirement: An alternative must satisfy hydraulic adequacy, budget, closure duration, right-of-way status, and permit readiness to be recommended without conditions.
notes: Owner preference cannot override a mandatory screen.

controlling_requirement: Maximum approved construction cost excluding contingency is $520,000.
notes: Contingency is shown separately in the cost workbook.

controlling_requirement: Maximum full closure of Old Mill Road is 5 consecutive calendar days.
notes: Night lane closures may be used outside this cap if emergency access is maintained.

controlling_requirement: In-channel work requires permit readiness or explicit open-item status before construction recommendation.
notes: Culvert cleaning and apron modification are in-channel work.

controlling_requirement: Work outside public right-of-way must have recorded easement before recommendation.
notes: Pending owner permission is not sufficient.
